name: Advantedge Healthcare Solutions Inc. (Acquired by Health Prime International)
h1: Advantedge Healthcare Solutions's GCC footprint in India
lede: Advantedge Healthcare Solutions runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Mumbai, covering SSC, built over fifteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Advantedge Healthcare Solutions office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
